title: MTU & MSS Negotiation
description: Evaluate the role of MTU and MSS in network packet transmission. Diagnose common fragmentation issues and silent packet drops caused by PMTUD failures. Implement solutions to prevent MTU-related performance degradation in complex network topologies.
objectives: Evaluate the role of MTU and MSS in network packet transmission.
Diagnose common fragmentation issues and silent packet drops caused by PMTUD failures.
Implement solutions to prevent MTU-related performance degradation in complex network topologies.
